company.name: RASHI MOLDEX
company.description: Leading manufacturer of industrial rubber components delivering precision, durability, and custom engineered solutions.
company.address: Plot 24, Industrial Area, Ankleshwar, Gujarat, India

hero.headline: Premium Industrial Rubber Solutions
hero.subheadline: Custom molded rubber products for demanding industries with performance, reliability, and engineering excellence.

about.overview: RASHI MOLDEX is a trusted industrial manufacturer specializing in rubber products engineered for heavy-duty applications. Our legacy of quality, innovation, and customer-centric service helps enterprises achieve higher uptime and safer operations.
about.vision: To be the global benchmark in industrial rubber manufacturing through technology, responsiveness, and sustainable practices.
about.mission: Deliver superior rubber solutions that protect equipment, extend service life, and improve operational efficiency for customers worldwide.
about.infrastructure: A modern manufacturing facility with CNC tooling, compression molding, injection molding, and precision finishing ensures consistent quality and fast turnaround.
about.quality: Strict quality assurance protocols, material traceability, and ISO-inspired inspection methods guarantee each component meets exacting industrial standards.
about.process: From design validation and material selection to molding, curing, and final inspection, our process is built for reliability and repeatable performance.

industries.title: Automotive
industries.description: Durable rubber components for engines, chassis, and vibration control.

industries.title: Oil & Gas
industries.description: High-performance seals and gaskets designed for extreme conditions.

industries.title: Construction
industries.description: Robust vibration mounts and pads for heavy machinery.

industries.title: Manufacturing
industries.description: Precision molded parts for automation and material handling equipment.

products.name: Rubber Bushes
products.summary: Engineered rubber bushes for isolating vibration and providing long service life in industrial assemblies.

products.name: Rubber Gaskets
products.summary: Precision-cut rubber gaskets for fluid sealing in industrial flanges, valves, and equipment housings.

products.name: O Rings
products.summary: Premium O-rings for static and dynamic sealing in hydraulic, pneumatic, and rotating equipment.

products.name: Rubber Seals
products.summary: Robust seals for preventing contamination, leaks, and wear in industrial machinery assemblies.

products.name: Rubber Bellows
products.summary: Flexible bellows to protect mechanical joints from dust, moisture, and mechanical stress.

products.name: Anti Vibration Mounts
products.summary: Heavy-duty mounts engineered to reduce vibration transfer and improve equipment stability.
specifications: Available in stud and flange types

products.name: Rubber Pads
products.summary: Durable rubber pads for shock absorption, floor protection, and anti-slip support.

products.name: Custom Molded Rubber Parts
products.summary: Tailor-made molded rubber components for specialized industrial applications and OEM projects.
